# AGENTS.md (Skills Directory)

## Structural Invariant

- **Do Not Add Here**: Do not create or add new skills inside `.github/skills/`.
- **Finding Skills**: To locate or consume skills, traverse up to the root folder (e.g., `../../git-expert`, `../../python-core`).
- **Skills**: Skills located in the root directory of this repository (`../../`).

## Final Assurance Gates

- Keep this file entropy-pruned and up-to-date.
- Inject full content into every sub-agent context.
- For latest standard see: <https://agents.md/>
